code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = ""
mut has = false
let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if has
      let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
      cur = ""
      has = false
    end
  else
    cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    has = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if has
  let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  nums = list.push(nums, v)
end

let total = nums.len()
mut out = ""
mut j = total - 1
while j >= 0
  let v = match nums.get(j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if j == total - 1
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  j = j - 1
end
println(out)
